flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Rockland Community College fell 30% between 2006 and 2009 (21.6% → 15.2%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rockland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rockland Community College fell 39% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.3k → $6.9k).

flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Rockland Community College are 22% above the public associate's-predominant peer median ($50.2k vs $41.2k).
